text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I drop by the dance studio one<n>morning to find...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: One, two, three!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: One... two... Yaaaawn...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Come on, Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If you really want to be the best<n>Umadol, you need
to work on your<n>dancing.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...You're the one who asked me to be<n>your
manager since we both have<n>today off.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ngh. Yeah, I know... It's just...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Waking up at five is completely<n>overdoing it! And
you made me run<n>right after!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I know it's quite strict, but based on<n>my
calculations last night, this is the<n>most suitable
schedule for you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Up at 5:00 a.m. for three hours of<n>running
practice—endurance also<n>plays a critical role in
dancing, you<n>know.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Uuuugh! You're so strict! Gahhh. In<n>that case...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I have just one request. ☆ Can we<n>make a
promise to take breaks and<n>not push ourselves
too hard?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No. You've had "just one request"<n>ten times
today already. Besides—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: BEEP, BEEP, BEEP, BEEP!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Time's up anyways.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, really?! Then, that means<n>we're done
for today!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Okay, on to our next activity. Our<n>afternoon
twenty-kilometer run will<n>start in one minute.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Say what now?! We're runningagain?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I watched a popular TV show to<n>learn some
tips. A very famous idol<n>talked about it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
She said, and I quote, "Idols need<n>endurance. They
must be able to<n>dance through pain while keeping
a<n>smile on their face."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I know you can reach<n>such potential!
Now then, let us be off,<n>Falcon!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Guh... Do you really mean that?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Then I have no choice but to do it!<n>Ughhh! You
really are the manager<n>from hell!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon is completely drowned<n>in tasks by
her one-off manager,<n>Eishin Flash.
